page.title: Upload dataset
page.description: Send a CSV file and the server will store it locally as a dataset folder.

form.title: New dataset
form.intro: The server will create the directory tree and generate the README file for the upload.

description.label: README notes
description.placeholder: Short notes that will be written to README.md

form.note: Dataset names must be unique. To upload a new file for an existing dataset, use the dataset viewer update button. Files are stored under storage/datasets.

side.title: Storage path
side.description: Uploads are saved in a folder structure that matches the database document.

list.title: Saved datasets
list.intro: Simple view of datasets persisted in the database.
list.no_versions: No versions linked to this dataset.

page.title: Dataset viewer
page.description: Preview dataset CSV content from local storage.

update.intro: Upload a new CSV to create another version of the selected dataset.

description.label: README notes
description.placeholder: Short notes for this new version

page.no_readme: No README content available for this version.
page.no_content: No CSV content available for preview.
